'''鈭歠-b-ng''' ('''kafabang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zoom|zoom]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-b-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zoom|zoom]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-b-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kafabang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifabang|thifabang]] || [[word:jifabang|jifabang]] || [[word:shifabang|shifabang]] || [[word:kifabang|kifabang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufabang|thuthufabang]] || [[word:jujufabang|jujufabang]] || [[word:shushufabang|shushufabang]] || [[word:kukufabang|kukufabang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufabang|thufabang]] || [[word:jufabang|jufabang]] || [[word:shufabang|shufabang]] || [[word:kufabang|kufabang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufabang|thufabang]] || [[word:jufabang|jufabang]] || [[word:shufabang|shufabang]] || [[word:kufabang|kufabang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefabang|thefabang]] || [[word:jefabang|jefabang]] || [[word:shefabang|shefabang]] || [[word:kefabang|kefabang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofabang|thothofabang]] || [[word:jojofabang|jojofabang]] || [[word:shoshofabang|shoshofabang]] || [[word:kokofabang|kokofabang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofabang|thofabang]] || [[word:jofabang|jofabang]] || [[word:shofabang|shofabang]] || [[word:kofabang|kofabang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofabang|thofabang]] || [[word:jofabang|jofabang]] || [[word:shofabang|shofabang]] || [[word:kofabang|kofabang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fabang|fabang]] || [[word:fabang|fabang]] || [[word:fabang|fabang]] || [[word:fabang|fabang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fabang|fabang]] || [[word:fabang|fabang]] || [[word:fabang|fabang]] || [[word:fabang|fabang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fabang|fabang]] || [[word:fabang|fabang]] || [[word:fabang|fabang]] || [[word:fabang|fabang]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fabang|fabang]] || [[word:fabang|fabang]] || [[word:fabang|fabang]] || [[word:fabang|fabang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙fabang|th忙fabang]] || [[word:j忙fabang|j忙fabang]] || [[word:sh忙fabang|sh忙fabang]] || [[word:k忙fabang|k忙fabang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafabang|thathafabang]] || [[word:jajafabang|jajafabang]] || [[word:shashafabang|shashafabang]] || [[word:kakafabang|kakafabang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafabang|thafabang]] || [[word:jafabang|jafabang]] || [[word:shafabang|shafabang]] || [[word:kafabang|kafabang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafabang|thafabang]] || [[word:jafabang|jafabang]] || [[word:shafabang|shafabang]] || [[word:kafabang|kafabang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafabang|shafabang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafabang|goshafabang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafabang|gokishafabang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafabangn眉|shafabangn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafabangnkn眉|goshafabangnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafabangn眉|gokishafabangn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafabangsh毛|shafabangsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafabangnksh毛|goshafabangnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafabangsh毛|gokishafabangsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafabangro|shafabangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafabangnkro|goshafabangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafabangro|gokishafabangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafabangmu|shafabangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafabangnkmu|goshafabangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafabangmu|gokishafabangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafabangsher|shafabangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafabangnksher|goshafabangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafabangsher|gokishafabangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafabangng|shafabangng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafabangnkng|goshafabangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafabangng|gokishafabangng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafabangya|shafabangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafabangnkya|goshafabangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafabangya|gokishafabangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafabangyam|shafabangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafabangnkyam|goshafabangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafabangyam|gokishafabangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafabangn眉sh毛|shafabangn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafabangnkn眉sh毛|goshafabangnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafabangn眉sh毛|gokishafabangn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafabangn眉ro|shafabangn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafabangnkn眉ro|goshafabangnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafabangn眉ro|gokishafabangn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafabangn眉mu|shafabangn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafabangnkn眉mu|goshafabangnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafabangn眉mu|gokishafabangn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafabangsh毛n眉|shafabangsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafabangnksh毛n眉|goshafabangnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafabangsh毛n眉|gokishafabangsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafabangsh毛ro|shafabangsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafabangnksh毛ro|goshafabangnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafabangsh毛ro|gokishafabangsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafabangsh毛mu|shafabangsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafabangnksh毛mu|goshafabangnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafabangsh毛mu|gokishafabangsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafabangron眉|shafabangron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafabangnkron眉|goshafabangnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafabangron眉|gokishafabangron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafabangrosh毛|shafabangrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafabangnkrosh毛|goshafabangnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafabangrosh毛|gokishafabangrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafabangromu|shafabangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafabangnkromu|goshafabangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafabangromu|gokishafabangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafabangmun眉|shafabangmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafabangnkmun眉|goshafabangnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafabangmun眉|gokishafabangmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafabangmush毛|shafabangmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafabangnkmush毛|goshafabangnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafabangmush毛|gokishafabangmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafabangmuro|shafabangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafabangnkmuro|goshafabangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafabangmuro|gokishafabangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|eda3f80}}
